Registry / Terms / subsequent verification

subsequent verification

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #00195 · 7 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.16view ↗

any verification of a measuring instrument after a previous verification and including: - mandatory periodic verification, - verification after repair

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.16
    any verification of a measuring instrument after a previous verification and including: - mandatory periodic verification, - verification after repair

Suggested actions

  1. INFO ✓ This term IS in VIML 2022 (concept #2.13). Definition may differ from VIML 2000.
  2. MEDIUM 6 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 3 partially diverge.

20102004OIML D 9:2004
#00195
2.13
any verification of a measuring instrument after a previous verification and including: - mandatory periodic verification; - verification after repair [VIML, 2.16]
ok
20101986OIML D 15:1986
#00263
2.6
any verification of a measuring instrument which follows the initial verification: mandatory periodic verification, verification after repair, or verification made before the expiry of the period of validity of the periodical verification made either : at the request of the user, or because for some reason the stamp is no longer valid for the remainder of this period of validity [VML 2.4.3]
partial

#03543
3.1.6
verification of measuring instrument after a previous verification
pending

verification of measuring instrument after a previous verification
partial

any verification of a measuring instrument after a previous verification and including mandatory periodic verification and verification after repair [VIML 2.16]
ok

any verification of a measuring instrument after a previous verification and including: mandatory periodic verification; verification after repair [VIML, 2.16]

2.6
any verification of a measuring instrument which follows the initial verification: mandatory periodic verification, verification after repair, or verification made before the expiry of the period of validity of the periodical verification made either : at the request of the user, or because for some reason the stamp is no longer valid for the remainder of this period of validity [VML 2.4.3
